title: High-Pressure Bomb Calorimeter Vessel
selected_approach: 316 stainless steel bomb vessel (1 L, rated 30 bar) with oxygen fill valve, ignition feedthroughs, and immersion in a 2 L water calorimeter jacket. Stirrer paddle on vessel exterior. Calorimeter constant C_v calibrated with benzoic acid pellets prior to use. PT100 probe port in water jacket.
